episodes.title: سر البلورة الزرقاء The Secret of the Blue Crystal
episodes.description:
في غابة سحرية قديمة يعيش راشد الثعلب المستكشف وصديقته لونا البومة الحكيمة.

في أحد الأيام يكتشفان آثاراً زرقاء متوهجة تقودهما إلى سر قديم مخفي منذ مئات السنين.

خلال رحلتهما يواجهان ألغازاً وأبواباً سحرية ومخلوقات غامضة حتى يصلا إلى البلورة الزرقاء الأسطورية التي تحمل قوة حماية الغابة بأكملها.

scenes.narration: في صباح مشرق داخل الغابة السحرية، كانت سنو وايت تتنزه بين الأشجار والأزهار الملونة. وبينما كانت تستمع إلى تغريد الطيور، لمحت شجرة تفاح غريبة تلمع ثمارها بلون ذهبي جميل. توقفت أمامها بدهشة واقتربت لتتفحصها.
scenes.subtitle_text: في صباح مشرق داخل الغابة السحرية، كانت سنو وايت تتنزه بين الأشجار والأزهار الملونة. وبينما كانت تستمع إلى تغريد الطيور، لمحت شجرة تفاح غريبة تلمع ثمارها بلون ذهبي جميل. توقفت أمامها بدهشة واقتربت لتتفحصها.

stylePresets.name: Pixar-Style Cinematic
stylePresets.description: High-quality 3D animation inspired by modern animated cinema. Rich colors, expressive characters, detailed environments.
stylePresets.lighting_rules: Soft ambient lighting with strong rim lights. Warm key light, cool fill. Subsurface scattering on skin.
stylePresets.camera_style: Dynamic camera angles, shallow depth of field, cinematic lens flares, rack focus transitions.
stylePresets.rendering_style: 3D CGI, photorealistic textures with stylized proportions. Smooth surfaces, detailed hair simulation.
stylePresets.character_guidance: Exaggerated proportions: large eyes, expressive faces, slightly oversized heads. Rounded features, appealing silhouettes.
stylePresets.negative_prompts: realistic human proportions, anime style, flat shading, low poly, pixelated, scary, horror
sample_prompts: A young adventurer with large expressive eyes standing at the edge of a colorful canyon, Pixar-style 3D animation, volumetric lighting
Two friends laughing in a magical forest clearing, 3D animated characters, warm golden hour lighting, cinematic composition

stylePresets.name: Disney-Inspired Family
stylePresets.description: Classic family animation style with fairy-tale aesthetics, magical environments, and expressive character design.
stylePresets.lighting_rules: Magical sparkle lighting, soft gradients, ethereal glow effects. Golden key light with purple shadows.
stylePresets.camera_style: Sweeping establishing shots, gentle dolly moves, classic composition with rule of thirds.
stylePresets.rendering_style: 3D animation with painterly textures. Soft edges, magical particle effects, detailed environments.
stylePresets.character_guidance: Graceful proportions, large eyes with sparkle, flowing hair/clothing. Clear hero/villain visual language.
stylePresets.negative_prompts: realistic, dark, horror, gritty, violent, anime, low quality
sample_prompts: A brave princess with flowing golden hair standing before an enchanted castle at sunset, magical particles in the air, 3D animated
A wise old mentor character with a long beard in a mystical library filled with floating books, warm magical lighting

stylePresets.name: Cinematic 3D Cartoon
stylePresets.description: Modern 3D cartoon with cinematic lighting and composition. Professional broadcast quality.
stylePresets.lighting_rules: Three-point lighting setup, dramatic shadows, color grading. HDR-style contrast.
stylePresets.camera_style: Film-like camera movements, anamorphic lens effects, cinematic aspect ratio.
stylePresets.rendering_style: High-end 3D rendering, PBR materials, ray-traced reflections, motion blur.
stylePresets.character_guidance: Semi-stylized proportions, detailed textures, expressive but grounded designs.
stylePresets.negative_prompts: flat shading, 2D, sketch, watercolor, low resolution, blurry
sample_prompts: A team of young scientists in a high-tech laboratory, 3D cartoon style, cinematic lighting, blue and orange color grading

stylePresets.name: Anime
stylePresets.description: Japanese animation style with dynamic action, vibrant colors, and characteristic art direction.
stylePresets.lighting_rules: Cel-shading with sharp light/shadow transitions. Dramatic backlighting, speed lines, impact frames.
stylePresets.camera_style: Dynamic angles, speed zooms, split screens, dramatic close-ups with lens flare.
stylePresets.rendering_style: 2D cel-shaded animation, clean line art, flat colors with gradient shading, dynamic effects.
stylePresets.character_guidance: Large expressive eyes, dynamic hair, slender proportions. Distinctive silhouettes, varied hairstyles.
stylePresets.negative_prompts: 3D render, realistic, western cartoon, clay, stop motion, blurry
sample_prompts: A young warrior with spiky blue hair standing on a cliff overlooking a vast ocean, anime style, dramatic sunset, wind blowing cape

stylePresets.name: Realistic Cinematic
stylePresets.description: Photorealistic rendering with cinematic film quality. Hollywood-grade visual effects.
stylePresets.lighting_rules: Natural lighting, HDRI environments, realistic shadows, lens effects, film grain.
stylePresets.camera_style: Professional cinematography, shallow DOF, anamorphic bokeh, steady dolly shots.
stylePresets.rendering_style: Photorealistic, ray-traced, physically accurate materials, realistic skin, detailed environments.
stylePresets.character_guidance: Realistic human proportions, detailed facial features, natural skin textures, realistic clothing folds.
stylePresets.negative_prompts: cartoon, anime, stylized, flat, low quality, deformed face, extra limbs
sample_prompts: A detective in a rain-soaked city alley at night, neon reflections on wet pavement, cinematic lighting, photorealistic, film grain

stylePresets.name: Semi-Realistic
stylePresets.description: Blend of realistic rendering with subtle stylization. Appealing yet believable.
stylePresets.lighting_rules: Soft studio lighting with slight stylization. Enhanced rim lights, subtle color grading.
stylePresets.camera_style: Cinematic framing, portrait lens compression, gentle camera movements.
stylePresets.rendering_style: Semi-realistic 3D, slightly enhanced proportions, detailed textures with stylized shading.
stylePresets.character_guidance: Slightly idealized proportions, clear skin, expressive but grounded faces, detailed but clean.
stylePresets.negative_prompts: cartoon, flat, anime, ugly, deformed, low quality
sample_prompts: A young woman with braided hair sitting in a cozy cafe, warm afternoon light through window, semi-realistic 3D style

stylePresets.name: Educational Kids
stylePresets.description: Bright, friendly animation style for educational content. Clear visuals, simple designs, engaging colors.
stylePresets.lighting_rules: Bright, even lighting with no harsh shadows. Cheerful, well-lit environments.
stylePresets.camera_style: Simple, clear compositions. Static or slow camera movements. No quick cuts.
stylePresets.rendering_style: Clean 3D or 2D animation, simple shapes, bold outlines, bright saturated colors.
stylePresets.character_guidance: Rounded, friendly shapes. Large heads, small bodies. Big smiles, simple features. Age-appropriate.
stylePresets.negative_prompts: scary, dark, violent, realistic, complex, horror, adult themes
sample_prompts: A friendly cartoon bear teacher pointing at a colorful alphabet board, bright classroom, educational kids animation style

stylePresets.name: Arabic Children Style
stylePresets.description: Animation style tailored for Arabic-speaking children. Cultural motifs, warm colors, and friendly characters.
stylePresets.lighting_rules: Warm golden lighting, desert sunset tones, soft shadows with cultural pattern overlays.
stylePresets.camera_style: Gentle establishing shots, character-focused framing, clear storytelling composition.
stylePresets.rendering_style: 3D animation with warm color grading, geometric pattern accents, cultural architecture.
stylePresets.character_guidance: Friendly rounded characters, culturally appropriate clothing, warm skin tones, large expressive eyes.
stylePresets.negative_prompts: scary, western only, culturally insensitive, dark, horror, adult
sample_prompts: A young boy in traditional Arabic clothing exploring a magical ancient library with geometric patterns, warm golden lighting, 3D kids animation

stylePresets.name: French Children Style
stylePresets.description: Elegant European children animation with artistic flair, soft pastels, and charming character design.
stylePresets.lighting_rules: Soft diffused lighting, pastel tones, gentle shadows, artistic bokeh.
stylePresets.camera_style: Elegant compositions, gentle pans, artistic framing with negative space.
stylePresets.rendering_style: 2D/3D hybrid, watercolor textures, soft edges, hand-drawn quality with digital polish.
stylePresets.character_guidance: Slender, elegant proportions, artistic styling, expressive faces, fashionable clothing.
stylePresets.negative_prompts: harsh, gritty, realistic, dark, violent, loud colors, anime
sample_prompts: A young girl with a beret walking through a Parisian garden with blooming flowers, soft pastel colors, French children animation style

stylePresets.name: Watercolor Storybook
stylePresets.description: Hand-painted watercolor aesthetic with soft bleeding colors and artistic imperfections.
stylePresets.lighting_rules: Soft natural light, no harsh shadows, light bleeds through elements, dreamy atmosphere.
stylePresets.camera_style: Static or very slow pans, storybook page compositions, illustrated borders.
stylePresets.rendering_style: Watercolor painting, visible brush strokes, soft color bleeding, paper texture overlay.
stylePresets.character_guidance: Simplified features, flowing lines, soft edges, gentle expressions, illustrated quality.
stylePresets.negative_prompts: 3D render, sharp edges, photorealistic, digital art, neon colors, dark
sample_prompts: A bunny in a garden reading a book under a willow tree, watercolor illustration, soft bleeding colors, paper texture

stylePresets.name: Clay Animation
stylePresets.description: Claymation style with visible material textures, fingerprint details, and handcrafted charm.
stylePresets.lighting_rules: Soft studio lighting, miniature set feel, subtle shadow play, warm practical lights.
stylePresets.camera_style: Fixed camera or slow dolly, miniature scale perspective, shallow depth of field.
stylePresets.rendering_style: Clay/plasticine textures, visible fingerprints, rounded forms, physical material quality.
stylePresets.character_guidance: Rounded clay forms, visible material texture, simple features, charming imperfections.
sample_prompts: A clay animated fox character in a tiny workshop making pottery, miniature set, warm studio lighting, claymation style

stylePresets.name: Stop Motion
stylePresets.description: Stop-motion animation aesthetic with slight frame jitter, physical materials, and crafted sets.
stylePresets.lighting_rules: Practical miniature lighting, slight flicker between frames, warm tungsten key light.
stylePresets.camera_style: Fixed tripod shots, occasional slow zoom, physical camera shake, miniature perspective.
stylePresets.rendering_style: Physical puppets/models, fabric textures, visible joints, handcrafted environments.
stylePresets.character_guidance: Puppet-like proportions, visible joints/seams, fabric/felt textures, button eyes.
stylePresets.negative_prompts: smooth digital, CGI, anime, 2D flat, photorealistic humans
sample_prompts: A felt puppet character exploring a miniature cardboard city at night, tiny LED lights, stop motion animation style

stylePresets.name: YouTube Kids Friendly
stylePresets.description: Optimized for YouTube Kids platform. Bright, safe, engaging content with educational value.
stylePresets.lighting_rules: Bright, flat lighting with no shadows. High-key, cheerful illumination throughout.
stylePresets.camera_style: Simple static shots or slow pans. Clear, uncluttered compositions. No fast cuts.
stylePresets.rendering_style: Bold, clean 3D or 2D animation. Simple shapes, bright colors, smooth animations.
stylePresets.character_guidance: Very simple, round, friendly characters. Primary colors. Age 2-6 appropriate. No sharp edges.
stylePresets.negative_prompts: scary, dark, complex, realistic, violence, adult themes, sharp objects
sample_prompts: A round colorful robot teaching numbers to happy children, bright primary colors, simple 3D animation, YouTube Kids style

stylePresets.name: Fantasy Adventure
stylePresets.description: Epic fantasy world with magical elements, grand landscapes, and heroic character design.
stylePresets.lighting_rules: Dramatic god rays, magical glow effects, moody atmospheric lighting, epic scale illumination.
stylePresets.camera_style: Epic wide establishing shots, dramatic low angles, sweeping crane movements.
stylePresets.rendering_style: High-detail 3D or digital painting, epic scale, detailed environments, magical effects.
stylePresets.character_guidance: Heroic proportions, detailed armor/clothing, magical accessories, distinctive silhouettes.
stylePresets.negative_prompts: modern, urban, minimal, simple, flat, realistic mundane
